title: Cobblemon Team Exporter
description: A simple, lightweight utility mod for Cobblemon that allows you to instantly export your current party to text formats, perfect for competitive players, tournament organizers, or just sharing your team with friends!
body:
# Cobblemon Team Exporter

A simple, lightweight utility mod for Cobblemon that allows you to instantly export your current party to text formats, perfect for competitive players, tournament organizers, or just sharing your team with friends!

## ✨ Features
* **One-Click Export:** Instantly convert your party into a **Pokepaste** (Showdown format) or a structured **JSON** file.
* **Clipboard Support:** Click the generated link in your Minecraft chat to instantly copy the exported data to your clipboard (No more digging through folders!).
* **Local Backups:** Automatically saves a `.txt` or `.json` file of your team inside the `cobblemon_exports` folder in your Minecraft directory.
* **Fully Compatible:** Captures Species, Held Items, Abilities, Levels, Natures, and Movesets accurately.

## 🚀 Commands
Use the following command in-game (requires at least one Pokémon in your party):

* `/exportteam pokepaste` - Exports your team in Pokémon Showdown format.
* `/exportteam json` - Exports your team as raw JSON data.

## 📥 Installation
1. Download the correct `.jar` version for your game.
2. Drop it into your `mods` folder.
3. Make sure you have **[Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)** installed.

---
*Note: This mod works perfectly on both Singleplayer and Multiplayer servers. The clipboard copy feature is fully client-safe!*
